# customerUpsert

Upserts a customer, creating it if it doesn't exists, updating it otherwise. Matches against an existing customer with `id` or `externalId`

## Signature

- Root: `Mutations`
- Return Type: [`CustomerPayload`](../objects/customer_payload-object.md)!

## Arguments

| Name | Type | Default | Deprecated | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `input` | [`CustomerUpsertInput`](../input-objects/customer_upsert_input-input.md)! | `n/a` | No | The customer to create. |
